TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Masilid, title = Masilid, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Masilid} }

S.FORM: == Masilid == u sulit nu Hulam: : u siwkay nu niyazu' i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Masilid. u kasalumaluma' nu Masilid sa, 334 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 994 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 946 ku tademaw, pakalatu 95%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 48 ku tademaw, pakalatu 5%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Paywan(Paiwan) 90%, Pangcah(Amis) 1%, Rukay(Rukai) 3%, zumazuma 1%. u niyazu' nu Paywan u Paywan a niyazu' kuyni. tuud ku Paywan a tademaw itiniay a niyazu'. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayay ku Sakizaya itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Rukay atu Pangcah u cidekay nu Taywan a Incumin: u Sakizaya a binacadan azihan i u Pangcah(Amis) a binacadan azihan i u Tayal a binacadan azihan i u Paywan a binacadan azihan i u Bunun a binacadan azihan i u Piyuma a binacadan azihan i u Rukay a binacadan azihan i u Takuku a binacadan azihan i u Sejek a binacadan azihan i u Saysia a binacadan azihan i u Kabalan a binacadan azihan i u Kanakanabu a binacadan azihan i u Laaluwa a binacadan azihan i u Saw a binacadan azihan i u Chou a binacadan azihan i u Tau a binacadan azihan i
S.PHON: == masir~…ĺid == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: : u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i piŇčtuŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu masir~…ĺid. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu masir~…ĺid sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, pajwan(paiwan) **%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, *ukaj(*ukai) *%, zumazuma *%. u nijazu Ē~ ° nu pajwan u pajwan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. tuud ku pajwan a tad…ômaw itiniaj a nijazu Ē~ °. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inajaj ku sakizaja itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u *ukaj atu paŇč ¶ańß u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan a in ¶umin: u sakizaja a bina ¶adan azińßan i u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) a bina ¶adan azińßan i u tajar~…ĺ a bina ¶adan azińßan i u pajwan a bina ¶adan azińßan i u bunun a bina ¶adan azińßan i u pijuma a bina ¶adan azińßan i u *ukaj a bina ¶adan azińßan i u takuku a bina ¶adan azińßan i u s…ôj…ôk a bina ¶adan azińßan i u sajsia a bina ¶adan azińßan i u kabar~…ĺan a bina ¶adan azińßan i u kanakanabu a bina ¶adan azińßan i u r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa a bina ¶adan azińßan i u saw a bina ¶adan azińßan i u ¶ńßou a bina ¶adan azińßan i u tau a bina ¶adan azińßan i
S.FORM: == Masilid == u sulit nu Hulam: : u siwkay nu niyazu' i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Masilid. u kasalumaluma' nu Masilid sa, 334 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 994 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 946 ku tademaw, pakalatu 95%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 48 ku tademaw, pakalatu 5%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Paywan(Paiwan) 90%, Pangcah(Amis) 1%, Rukay(Rukai) 3%, zumazuma 1%. u niyazu' nu Paywan u Paywan a niyazu' kuyni. tuud ku Paywan a tademaw itiniay a niyazu'. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayay ku Sakizaya itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Rukay atu Pangcah u cidekay nu Taywan a Incumin: u Sakizaya a binacadan azihan i u Pangcah(Amis) a binacadan azihan i u Tayal a binacadan azihan i u Paywan a binacadan azihan i u Bunun a binacadan azihan i u Piyuma a binacadan azihan i u Rukay a binacadan azihan i u Takuku a binacadan azihan i u Sejek a binacadan azihan i u Saysia a binacadan azihan i u Kabalan a binacadan azihan i u Kanakanabu a binacadan azihan i u Laaluwa a binacadan azihan i u Saw a binacadan azihan i u Chou a binacadan azihan i u Tau a binacadan azihan i
S.PHON: == masir~…ĺid == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: : u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i piŇčtuŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu masir~…ĺid. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu masir~…ĺid sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, pajwan(paiwan) **%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, *ukaj(*ukai) *%, zumazuma *%. u nijazu Ē~ ° nu pajwan u pajwan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. tuud ku pajwan a tad…ômaw itiniaj a nijazu Ē~ °. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inajaj ku sakizaja itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u *ukaj atu paŇč ¶ańß u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan a in ¶umin: u sakizaja a bina ¶adan azińßan i u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) a bina ¶adan azińßan i u tajar~…ĺ a bina ¶adan azińßan i u pajwan a bina ¶adan azińßan i u bunun a bina ¶adan azińßan i u pijuma a bina ¶adan azińßan i u *ukaj a bina ¶adan azińßan i u takuku a bina ¶adan azińßan i u s…ôj…ôk a bina ¶adan azińßan i u sajsia a bina ¶adan azińßan i u kabar~…ĺan a bina ¶adan azińßan i u kanakanabu a bina ¶adan azińßan i u r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa a bina ¶adan azińßan i u saw a bina ¶adan azińßan i u ¶ńßou a bina ¶adan azińßan i u tau a bina ¶adan azińßan i
